core.title: Desert Tour: Sahl Hasheesh Stargazing & BBQ Dinner
core.excerpt: This desert tour in Sahl Hasheesh offers a complete evening...
core.content_html:
Overview

Experience the magic of Egypt’s wilderness with our unforgettable desert tour from Sahl Hasheesh. This evening adventure combines thrilling exploration with serene moments under the stars. You’ll discover why our desert tour is the perfect escape from resort life.

Begin with a scenic journey through golden dunes as the sun paints the horizon. Arrive at an authentic Bedouin camp where traditional hospitality awaits. This desert tour offers a complete cultural and natural immersion.

Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under candlelight as darkness envelops the landscape. Then witness the desert’s true magic during our guided stargazing session. This desert tour creates memories that last a lifetime.

Whether seeking romance, family adventure, or solo discovery, this desert tour delivers exceptional value. Experience Egypt’s nocturnal beauty on this carefully crafted desert tour.

cost.cost_includes:
Hotel pickup and drop-off from Sahl Hasheesh or Makadi Bay
Camel ride through the Sahl Hasheesh desert
FTS Scarve (Optional add-on - $10)
Stargazing experience with high-powered telescopes and guided sky tour
Shared Photographer per person (Optional add-on - $30)
Bedouin camp visit
Traditional Bedouin bread baking demonstration
Soft drink during sunset and dinner
Seasonal fruits (2 different kinds)
30-minute quad bike ride (if option selected)
Experienced desert guide
FTS Organic oils - 100% pure (Optional add-on - $10)
Traditional BBQ dinner with 5 hot dishes
cost.cost_excludes:
Tips and gratuities
Scarves and any personal expenses
Travel insurance
Pickup from El Gouna, Soma Bay and Safaga

faq_title: What happens if the weather is bad on our scheduled tour date?
Can we do both camel riding and quad biking during the tour?
Where and when is the hotel pickup for this tour?
What makes your Sahl Hasheesh desert experience different from others?
How do I book the Sahl Hasheesh desert stargazing and BBQ dinner tour?
Can you accommodate dietary restrictions for the BBQ dinner?
How large are the groups for the desert stargazing tour?
What fitness level do I need for the camel ride and desert activities?
What happens if I need to cancel my booking?
How much cash should I bring for the optional quad biking and tips?
What should I bring for the evening desert stargazing experience?
Is the desert stargazing tour safe for solo travelers and families?
faq_content: We monitor desert conditions closely and will contact you if weather affects the tour. In rare cases of unsuitable conditions, we offer to reschedule or provide a full refund—your experience matters more than pushing forward on a compromised evening.

Yes, the camel ride is included for everyone, and quad biking is available as an optional add-on. Many guests enjoy both experiences—the peaceful camel ride at sunset followed by the adventurous thrill of quad biking across the dunes under the stars.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby at 4:00 PM. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation, ensuring a hassle-free start. You’ll receive confirmation details after booking.

Our combination of authentic cultural immersion (Bedouin bread baking, traditional stories), breathtaking sunset photography opportunities, and professional stargazing with guided telescope use creates a complete desert evening. We focus on quality over quantity, ensuring you leave with genuine memories, not just photos.

You can book directly online for instant confirmation and secure your spot. Our booking system is straightforward and provides immediate confirmation, so you can plan the rest of your vacation with peace of mind.

Yes, please inform us of any dietary restrictions when booking. Our traditional BBQ dinner includes five hot dishes and seasonal fruits, and we can accommodate most common dietary needs with advance notice to ensure you enjoy the authentic flavors.

We keep groups intimate to ensure personalized attention from your guide and quality time with the telescopes. You'll have plenty of opportunities to ask questions about the stars and Bedouin culture throughout the evening.

This tour is suitable for most fitness levels—we've hosted families with children and seniors who've thoroughly enjoyed the experience. The camel ride is gentle, and all activities are at a relaxed pace, though you should be comfortable with basic mobility like getting on/off the camel.

If you need to cancel your booking, don’t worry—you can cancel at any time. You’ll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Please contact our customer service team and we’ll be happy to help you cancel or reschedule.

Bring some Egyptian pounds for the optional quad bike ride (extra fee applies) and if you wish to tip your guide. The tour includes almost everything—just personal spending money for extras and gratuities for exceptional service.

Bring a jacket or sweater (desert nights can be cool), comfortable closed-toe shoes, your camera for sunset photos, and a sense of adventure. We provide the telescopes, guidance, and everything else you need for an unforgettable evening under the stars.

Absolutely—your safety is our priority with experienced desert guides, reliable transportation, and well-established camp facilities. We've hosted countless solo travelers, couples, and families who all felt completely secure while enjoying the magical desert atmosphere.

itinerary_title.1: 4:00 PM – Hotel Pickup | 🚐 Transfer | Desert Adventure Begins
itinerary_title.2: 4:30 PM – Sahl Hasheesh Desert | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight
itinerary_title.3: 5:15 PM – Desert Dunes | 📸 Photo Stop | ⭐ Highlight
itinerary_title.4: 5:45 PM – Bedouin-Style Camp | 🎯 Activity | Authentic Atmosphere
itinerary_title.5: 6:30 PM – Campfire Area | 🎯 Activity | Cultural Insight
itinerary_title.8: 9:00 PM – Return Journey | 🚐 Transfer | Journey's End

itinerary_content.1: Your desert adventure begins with a comfortable pickup from your hotel in Sahl Hasheesh, Hurghada, Makadi Bay, El Gouna, or Safaga. Settle in for a scenic drive as your guide shares fascinating insights about the Eastern Desert's unique ecosystem and Bedouin heritage, building anticipation for the evening ahead.
itinerary_content.2: Arrive at the edge of the golden dunes and wrap yourself in a traditional Egyptian scarf for style and sun protection. Mount your gentle camel for a serene ride through the silent, rolling sands, feeling the timeless rhythm of desert travel as the sun begins its descent.
itinerary_content.3: Disembark at a prime vantage point to witness one of Egypt's most breathtaking desert sunsets. Your guide will help you capture the perfect shot as the sky ignites in brilliant shades of orange and purple, painting the endless dunes in a golden hour glow. Sip a refreshing soft drink as you take in the panoramic view.
itinerary_content.4: Travel deeper into the desert to arrive at a welcoming Bedouin-style camp, illuminated by flickering lanterns and candles. Feel the authentic desert atmosphere envelop you as you're greeted with traditional hospitality. Listen to captivating stories of desert life and Bedouin traditions from your experienced guide around the warm campfire.
itinerary_content.5: Roll up your sleeves and learn the ancient art of Bedouin bread baking over hot coals. Feel the warmth of the fire as you shape the dough, connecting with a culinary tradition passed down through generations. Watch traditional Bedouin performers bring the culture to life through captivating dance and music around the campfire.
itinerary_content.6: Savor a feast of five hot traditional dishes alongside seasonal fruits, enjoying authentic flavors in the open desert air. Your freshly baked bread is the perfect accompaniment. This traditional BBQ dinner under the stars, with the campfire crackling nearby, is a true highlight of Egypt desert tours.
itinerary_content.7: As the sky darkens into a velvet canvas, embark on a guided celestial tour. Peer through high-powered telescopes to explore distant galaxies, star clusters, and planets invisible to the naked eye. Expert guides will point out constellations and share the astronomy woven into Bedouin navigation and folklore, making this a premier desert stargazing experience.
itinerary_content.8: Bid farewell to the silent desert, carrying memories of golden dunes, delicious food, and a sky full of stars. Relax on the comfortable return transfer to your hotel, arriving around 11:00 PM, having experienced the magic of a complete desert safari tour.

tab_content.1_wpeditor:
Overview

Experience the magic of Egypt's wilderness with our unforgettable desert tour from Sahl Hasheesh. This evening adventure combines thrilling exploration with serene moments under the stars. You'll discover why our desert tour is the perfect escape from resort life.

Begin with a scenic journey through golden dunes as the sun paints the horizon. Arrive at an authentic Bedouin camp where traditional hospitality awaits. This desert tour offers a complete cultural and natural immersion.

Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under candlelight as darkness envelops the landscape. Then witness the desert's true magic during our guided stargazing session. This desert tour creates memories that last a lifetime.

Whether seeking romance, family adventure, or solo discovery, this desert tour delivers exceptional value. Experience Egypt's nocturnal beauty on this carefully crafted desert tour.
tab_content.8_wpeditor:
Why People Love This Trip

*Unforgettable Desert Magic Under the Stars* ⭐
Travelers rave about the magical moment when millions of stars appear overhead. The combination of sunset colors, candlelight dinner, and crystal-clear stargazing creates pure desert magic that feels worlds away from everyday life.

*Hassle-Free Desert Adventure* 🚐
We handle everything from hotel pickup to return transportation. You simply relax and enjoy the experience without worrying about logistics, directions, or planning in unfamiliar desert terrain.

*Authentic Cultural Immersion* 👨‍🏫
Our Bedouin hosts share genuine traditions, not tourist performances. Guests love learning bread-baking techniques, hearing desert stories, and experiencing hospitality that feels personal and authentic.

*Incredible Value Experience* 💰
This desert tour packs sunset viewing, cultural show, gourmet dinner, and astronomy session into one unforgettable evening. Travelers consistently say it's the best value experience of their Egypt vacation.

*Perfect Balance of Adventure & Relaxation* 🎯
We expertly blend thrilling dune exploration with serene camp moments. Whether you choose quad biking or prefer gentle camel rides, everyone finds their perfect pace on this desert tour.

*Connection with Nature's Majesty* ❤️
Guests describe feeling awe and peace simultaneously. The vast silent desert under infinite stars creates emotional moments that stay with you long after returning home.

*Ideal for Romance & Family Fun* 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
Couples love the romantic candlelight atmosphere, while families appreciate the engaging activities for all ages. This desert tour truly offers something special for every type of traveler.

trip_highlights.highlight_text: Learn the art of Bedouin bread baking over hot coals, then savor it fresh with your BBQ dinner under the starry desert sky.
Watch traditional Bedouin performers bring desert culture to life through captivating dance and music around the campfire.
Ride a camel through golden dunes at sunset, feeling the desert's vast silence before arriving at your welcoming Bedouin camp.
Explore distant galaxies through high-powered telescopes with expert guides who reveal celestial wonders invisible to the naked eye.
Feel the desert's thrill on an optional quad bike ride across rolling dunes, adding an adventurous rush to your evening under the stars.
Savor five hot traditional dishes alongside seasonal fruits, enjoying authentic flavors in the open desert air as the campfire crackles nearby.
Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf for stylish desert flair and essential protection from sun and sand during your adventure.
Listen to captivating stories of desert life and Bedouin traditions from your experienced guide around the warm campfire.
Capture the desert's golden hour glow during a guided photography session, learning to frame perfect sunset shots against endless dunes.
Sip a refreshing soft drink as the sun dips below the dunes, painting the desert sky in brilliant shades of orange and purple.

wp_travel_engine_setting.trip_itinerary_description:
Itinerary

Hotel pickup from Sahl Hasheesh or Makadi Bay begins your desert tour adventure. Travel through scenic landscapes toward the golden dunes.

Arrive at the desert edge for optional activities. Choose a thrilling quad bike ride across the sands (extra fee).

Continue deeper into the wilderness on this immersive desert tour. Witness a breathtaking desert sunset painting the sky.

Arrive at the traditional Bedouin-style camp. Enjoy warm hospitality with herbal tea and seasonal fruits.

Watch authentic Bedouin bread baking over open flames. Learn about desert culture and traditions from local hosts.

Feast on a delicious BBQ dinner with five hot dishes. Enjoy soft drinks under candlelight and stargazing preparations.

Experience guided stargazing with high-powered telescopes. Spot constellations, planets, and galaxies with expert assistance.

Enjoy traditional Bedouin dance performances around the campfire. Immerse yourself in the peaceful desert atmosphere before return.

Return transportation to your hotel concludes this magical desert tour.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Scarve
descriptions: Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf, offering both stylish desert flair and essential protection from sun and sand during your adventure.

trip_extra_services.label: Shared Photographer per person
descriptions: Preserve every magical moment—from golden sunset rides to starlit dinners—with a professional photographer dedicated to capturing your unforgettable desert journey.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Organic oils " Organic 100%
descriptions: Enhance your senses with pure, locally sourced organic oils, offering a natural and aromatic keepsake of Egypt's rich botanical heritage.

Savor five hot traditional dishes alongside seasonal fruits, enjoying authentic flavors in the open desert air as the campfire crackles nearby.
Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf for stylish desert flair and essential protection from sun and sand during your adventure.
Listen to captivating stories of desert life and Bedouin traditions from your experienced guide around the warm campfire.
Capture the desert's golden hour glow during a guided photography session, learning to frame perfect sunset shots against endless dunes.
Sip a refreshing soft drink as the sun dips below the dunes, painting the desert sky in brilliant shades of orange and purple.

raw.trip_itinerary_description:
Itinerary

Hotel pickup from Sahl Hasheesh or Makadi Bay begins your desert tour adventure. Travel through scenic landscapes toward the golden dunes.

Arrive at the desert edge for optional activities. Choose a thrilling quad bike ride across the sands (extra fee).

Continue deeper into the wilderness on this immersive desert tour. Witness a breathtaking desert sunset painting the sky.

Arrive at the traditional Bedouin-style camp. Enjoy warm hospitality with herbal tea and seasonal fruits.

Watch authentic Bedouin bread baking over open flames. Learn about desert culture and traditions from local hosts.

Feast on a delicious BBQ dinner with five hot dishes. Enjoy soft drinks under candlelight and stargazing preparations.

Experience guided stargazing with high-powered telescopes. Spot constellations, planets, and galaxies with expert assistance.

Enjoy traditional Bedouin dance performances around the campfire. Immerse yourself in the peaceful desert atmosphere before return.

Return transportation to your hotel concludes this magical desert tour.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Scarve
descriptions: Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf, offering both stylish desert flair and essential protection from sun and sand during your adventure.

trip_extra_services.label: Shared Photographer per person
descriptions: Preserve every magical moment—from golden sunset rides to starlit dinners—with a professional photographer dedicated to capturing your unforgettable desert journey.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Organic oils " Organic 100%
descriptions: Enhance your senses with pure, locally sourced organic oils, offering a natural and aromatic keepsake of Egypt's rich botanical heritage.

Bedouin camp visit
Traditional Bedouin bread baking demonstration
Soft drink during sunset and dinner
Seasonal fruits (2 different kinds)
30-minute quad bike ride (if option selected)

Tips and gratuities

faq_title: What happens if the weather is bad on our scheduled tour date?
Can we do both camel riding and quad biking during the tour?
Where and when is the hotel pickup for this tour?
What makes your Sahl Hasheesh desert experience different from others?
How do I book the Sahl Hasheesh desert stargazing and BBQ dinner tour?
Can you accommodate dietary restrictions for the BBQ dinner?
How large are the groups for the desert stargazing tour?
What fitness level do I need for the camel ride and desert activities?
What happens if I need to cancel my booking?
How much cash should I bring for the optional quad biking and tips?
What should I bring for the evening desert stargazing experience?
Is the desert stargazing tour safe for solo travelers and families?
faq_content: We monitor desert conditions closely and will contact you if weather affects the tour. In rare cases of unsuitable conditions, we offer to reschedule or provide a full refund—your experience matters more than pushing forward on a compromised evening.

Yes, the camel ride is included for everyone, and quad biking is available as an optional add-on. Many guests enjoy both experiences—the peaceful camel ride at sunset followed by the adventurous thrill of quad biking across the dunes under the stars.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby at 4:00 PM. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation, ensuring a hassle-free start. You’ll receive confirmation details after booking.

Our combination of authentic cultural immersion (Bedouin bread baking, traditional stories), breathtaking sunset photography opportunities, and professional stargazing with guided telescope use creates a complete desert evening. We focus on quality over quantity, ensuring you leave with genuine memories, not just photos.

You can book directly online for instant confirmation and secure your spot. Our booking system is straightforward and provides immediate confirmation, so you can plan the rest of your vacation with peace of mind.

Yes, please inform us of any dietary restrictions when booking. Our traditional BBQ dinner includes five hot dishes and seasonal fruits, and we can accommodate most common dietary needs with advance notice to ensure you enjoy the authentic flavors.

We keep groups intimate to ensure personalized attention from your guide and quality time with the telescopes. You'll have plenty of opportunities to ask questions about the stars and Bedouin culture throughout the evening.

This tour is suitable for most fitness levels—we've hosted families with children and seniors who've thoroughly enjoyed the experience. The camel ride is gentle, and all activities are at a relaxed pace, though you should be comfortable with basic mobility like getting on/off the camel.

If you need to cancel your booking, don’t worry—you can cancel at any time. You’ll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Please contact our customer service team and we’ll be happy to help you cancel or reschedule.

Bring some Egyptian pounds for the optional quad bike ride (extra fee applies) and if you wish to tip your guide. The tour includes almost everything—just personal spending money for extras and gratuities for exceptional service.

Bring a jacket or sweater (desert nights can be cool), comfortable closed-toe shoes, your camera for sunset photos, and a sense of adventure. We provide the telescopes, guidance, and everything else you need for an unforgettable evening under the stars.

Absolutely—your safety is our priority with experienced desert guides, reliable transportation, and well-established camp facilities. We've hosted countless solo travelers, couples, and families who all felt completely secure while enjoying the magical desert atmosphere.

trip_itinerary.title: 4:00 PM – Hotel Pickup | 🚐 Transfer | Desert Adventure Begins
trip_itinerary.content: Your desert adventure begins with a comfortable pickup from your hotel in Sahl Hasheesh, Hurghada, Makadi Bay, El Gouna, or Safaga. Settle in for a scenic drive as your guide shares fascinating insights about the Eastern Desert's unique ecosystem and Bedouin heritage, building anticipation for the evening ahead.

trip_itinerary.title: 4:30 PM – Sahl Hasheesh Desert | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Arrive at the edge of the golden dunes and wrap yourself in a traditional Egyptian scarf for style and sun protection. Mount your gentle camel for a serene ride through the silent, rolling sands, feeling the timeless rhythm of desert travel as the sun begins its descent.

trip_itinerary.title: 5:15 PM – Desert Dunes | 📸 Photo Stop | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Disembark at a prime vantage point to witness one of Egypt's most breathtaking desert sunsets. Your guide will help you capture the perfect shot as the sky ignites in brilliant shades of orange and purple, painting the endless dunes in a golden hour glow. Sip a refreshing soft drink as you take in the panoramic view.

trip_itinerary.title: 5:45 PM – Bedouin-Style Camp | 🎯 Activity | Authentic Atmosphere
trip_itinerary.content: Travel deeper into the desert to arrive at a welcoming Bedouin-style camp, illuminated by flickering lanterns and candles. Feel the authentic desert atmosphere envelop you as you're greeted with traditional hospitality. Listen to captivating stories of desert life and Bedouin traditions from your experienced guide around the warm campfire.

trip_itinerary.title: 6:30 PM – Campfire Area | 🎯 Activity | Cultural Insight
trip_itinerary.content: Roll up your sleeves and learn the ancient art of Bedouin bread baking over hot coals. Feel the warmth of the fire as you shape the dough, connecting with a culinary tradition passed down through generations. Watch traditional Bedouin performers bring the culture to life through captivating dance and music around the campfire.

trip_itinerary.title: 7:00 PM – Dining Area | 🍽️ Meal | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Savor a feast of five hot traditional dishes alongside seasonal fruits, enjoying authentic flavors in the open desert air. Your freshly baked bread is the perfect accompaniment. This traditional BBQ dinner under the stars, with the campfire crackling nearby, is a true highlight of Egypt desert tours.

trip_itinerary.title: 8:00 PM – Desert Sky | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: As the sky darkens into a velvet canvas, embark on a guided celestial tour. Peer through high-powered telescopes to explore distant galaxies, star clusters, and planets invisible to the naked eye. Expert guides will point out constellations and share the astronomy woven into Bedouin navigation and folklore, making this a premier desert stargazing experience.

trip_itinerary.title: 9:00 PM – Return Journey | 🚐 Transfer | Journey's End
trip_itinerary.content: Bid farewell to the silent desert, carrying memories of golden dunes, delicious food, and a sky full of stars. Relax on the comfortable return transfer to your hotel, arriving around 11:00 PM, having experienced the magic of a complete desert safari tour.

tab_content.1_wpeditor:
Overview

Experience the magic of Egypt's wilderness with our unforgettable desert tour from Sahl Hasheesh. This evening adventure combines thrilling exploration with serene moments under the stars. You'll discover why our desert tour is the perfect escape from resort life.

Begin with a scenic journey through golden dunes as the sun paints the horizon. Arrive at an authentic Bedouin camp where traditional hospitality awaits. This desert tour offers a complete cultural and natural immersion.

Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under candlelight as darkness envelops the landscape. Then witness the desert's true magic during our guided stargazing session. This desert tour creates memories that last a lifetime.

Whether seeking romance, family adventure, or solo discovery, this desert tour delivers exceptional value. Experience Egypt's nocturnal beauty on this carefully crafted desert tour.
tab_content.8_wpeditor:
Why People Love This Trip

*Unforgettable Desert Magic Under the Stars* ⭐
Travelers rave about the magical moment when millions of stars appear overhead. The combination of sunset colors, candlelight dinner, and crystal-clear stargazing creates pure desert magic that feels worlds away from everyday life.

*Hassle-Free Desert Adventure* 🚐
We handle everything from hotel pickup to return transportation. You simply relax and enjoy the experience without worrying about logistics, directions, or planning in unfamiliar desert terrain.

*Authentic Cultural Immersion* 👨‍🏫
Our Bedouin hosts share genuine traditions, not tourist performances. Guests love learning bread-baking techniques, hearing desert stories, and experiencing hospitality that feels personal and authentic.

*Incredible Value Experience* 💰
This desert tour packs sunset viewing, cultural show, gourmet dinner, and astronomy session into one unforgettable evening. Travelers consistently say it's the best value experience of their Egypt vacation.

*Perfect Balance of Adventure & Relaxation* 🎯
We expertly blend thrilling dune exploration with serene camp moments. Whether you choose quad biking or prefer gentle camel rides, everyone finds their perfect pace on this desert tour.

*Connection with Nature's Majesty* ❤️
Guests describe feeling awe and peace simultaneously. The vast silent desert under infinite stars creates emotional moments that stay with you long after returning home.

*Ideal for Romance & Family Fun* 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
Couples love the romantic candlelight atmosphere, while families appreciate the engaging activities for all ages. This desert tour truly offers something special for every type of traveler.

trip_highlights.highlight_text: Learn the art of Bedouin bread baking over hot coals, then savor it fresh with your BBQ dinner under the starry desert sky.
Watch traditional Bedouin performers bring desert culture to life through captivating dance and music around the campfire.
Ride a camel through golden dunes at sunset, feeling the desert's vast silence before arriving at your welcoming Bedouin camp.
Explore distant galaxies through high-powered telescopes with expert guides who reveal celestial wonders invisible to the naked eye.
Feel the desert's thrill on an optional quad bike ride across rolling dunes, adding an adventurous rush to your evening under the stars.
Savor five hot traditional dishes alongside seasonal fruits, enjoying authentic flavors in the open desert air as the campfire crackles nearby.
Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf for stylish desert flair and essential protection from sun and sand during your adventure.
Listen to captivating stories of desert life and Bedouin traditions from your experienced guide around the warm campfire.
Capture the desert's golden hour glow during a guided photography session, learning to frame perfect sunset shots against endless dunes.
Sip a refreshing soft drink as the sun dips below the dunes, painting the desert sky in brilliant shades of orange and purple.
